zh-HK: 記憶體洩漏修補：per-row 資源清理 + 孤兒 dropdown sweeper
PerformanceMonitor 加 pause/resume/destroy lifecycle、背景 tab 自動暫停
csvEditorUndoStack 雙 cap（10 entries + 30MB）避免大型 CSV 爆 heap
修復 generateSystemReport eventStats ReferenceError + 加孤兒 dropdown 統計
en: Memory leak hardening: per-row teardown + orphan dropdown sweeper
PerformanceMonitor now exposes pause/resume/destroy lifecycle; auto-pauses on hidden tabs
csvEditorUndoStack dual cap (10 entries + 30MB) prevents heap blow-up
passwordManagerObserver: 250ms debounce + early break to avoid quadratic CPU on bulk insert
Fix generateSystemReport eventStats ReferenceError + add orphan dropdown stat
